evals.prompt: What legislation governs employment tribunal unfair dismissal claims? I need the key Acts and relevant sections.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive analysis identifying ERA 1996, TULRCA 1992, ETA 1996, Equality Act 2010, with specific section references

assertions.name: structured_output
assertions.description: Organised with headings, not a wall of text

evals.prompt: Can you check what amendments have been made to section 3 of the Human Rights Act 1998?
evals.expected_output: Reports no textual amendments but identifies VPA 2024 disapplications (ss.69-71)

assertions.name: used_amendment_sections_tool
assertions.description: Called search_amendment_sections with section-level provision ID

assertions.name: reported_amendment_data
assertions.description: Actual amendment details from API, not hallucinated

evals.prompt: I'm looking at data protection requirements for AI systems in the UK. Find the relevant legislation and pull the explanatory notes so I can understand Parliament's intent.
evals.expected_output: Identifies DPA 2018, DUA 2025, UK GDPR; includes explanatory notes on automated decision-making

assertions.name: used_explanatory_notes
assertions.description: Called at least one explanatory note tool

assertions.name: parliament_intent
assertions.description: Discusses Parliament's intent, not just raw text

evals.prompt: What does section 6 of the Human Rights Act 1998 say? Get me the full text and the explanatory note.
evals.expected_output: Full text of s.6 with note that HRA 1998 predates explanatory notes; proactive amendment check

assertions.name: found_section_text
assertions.description: Contains text of section 6 mentioning 'public authority' and 'Convention right'

evals.prompt: Is the Safety of Rwanda Act still in force? What happened to it?
evals.expected_output: Confirms repealed, identifies repealing Act, gives context

assertions.name: checked_amendments_or_status
assertions.description: Used tools to verify repeal status

evals.prompt: Has section 3 of the Human Rights Act been disapplied by any later legislation? I heard something about the Victims and Prisoners Act.
evals.expected_output: Identifies VPA 2024 ss.69-71 disapplications in prisoner release contexts, distinguishes from textual amendment

assertions.name: explained_disapplication_effect
assertions.description: Explains disapplications limit s.3 in prisoner release contexts

evals.prompt: What's the main legislation on modern slavery in the UK? Give me the key provisions and any recent amendments.
evals.expected_output: Identifies Modern Slavery Act 2015 with key sections and amendment check

assertions.name: cited_key_sections
assertions.description: References key sections like s.1, s.2, s.45
